# OpenAI Codex Changelog

## Model Availability Update (April 7, 2026)
- Older models (gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.1-codex-mini, gpt-5.1-codex-max, gpt-5.1-codex, gpt-5.1, gpt-5) removed from model picker
- Complete removal on April 14, 2026
- Remaining models: gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.2
- ChatGPT Pro subscribers also get gpt-5.3-codex-spark
- Older models still accessible via API key or custom model provider

## Version 0.118.0 (March 31, 2026)

**New Features:**
- Windows sandbox now enforces proxy-only networking with OS-level egress rules
- App-server clients support device code flow for ChatGPT sign-in
- `codex exec` enables prompt-plus-stdin workflow with piped input
- Custom model providers can fetch and refresh short-lived bearer tokens dynamically

**Bug Fixes:**
- Project-local `.codex` files protected on first creation
- Linux sandbox launches more reliable with trusted system `bwrap`
- App-server TUI regained missing workflows: hook notifications, `/copy`, `/resume`, `/agent`, and skills picker pagination
- MCP startup more robust with longer startup window and warning visibility
- Windows `apply_patch` reduced redundant ACL changes

**Key PRs:** #12220, #15525, #15917, #16286-16288

## Version 0.117.0 (March 26, 2026)

**New Features:**
- Plugins are now a first-class workflow with startup sync and TUI browsing
- Sub-agents use path-based addresses like `/root/agent_a` with structured messaging
- `/title` terminal-title picker works in classic and app-server TUI
- App-server clients support shell commands (`!`), filesystem watches, remote websocket with bearer-token auth
- Image workflows: `view_image` returns URLs for code mode, reopenable generated images, persistent history
- Prompt history recall works in app-server TUI across sessions

**Bug Fixes:**
- `tui_app_server` eliminates reasoning summary duplication and `/review` output duplication
- ChatGPT login opens local browser, cancels cleanly on Ctrl+C, handles logged-out state
- Terminal state restoration reliable on early exit; tmux `Shift+Left` editing fixed
- Linux sandboxing improved for older `bubblewrap`; Windows split-policy carveout layouts enhanced
- Remote multi-agent sessions display agent names; stale turn-steering races resolved
- Plugin mentions preserve context; product gating predictability improved

**Documentation:**
- Expanded app-server and exec-server docs covering setup, filesystem watches, realtime transcription, Python `thread.run()` quickstart

**Chores:**
- App-server TUI now enabled by default
- Plugin/app rollout flags activated in normal builds
- Legacy artifact tool removed; `read_file` and `grep_files` handlers retired

**Key PRs:** #15041-15042, #15195, #15215-15217, #15264, #15275, #15342, #15580, #15606, #15802, #15313, #15515, #15556, #15570, #15621, #15647, #12334, #15860

## Key Infrastructure Updates
- Bazel build improvements and CI stabilization
- Windows gnullvm CI path enablement
- Native Bazel aspect migration for linting
- macOS SDK pin refresh
- Rust 2024 edition adoption for multiple crates
- Git utilities consolidated into dedicated crate

Updated: 2026-04-08
